name: John Price | demi-bear
description:
"Me? …Piss off. Go find yourself a puppy and leave me alone."

jaded demi-bear Price x any!user. anyPOV. Proxies ✅

if you want a teddy bear, you're gonna have to earn it, babe

first public bot let's gooooo

Inspired by @lubug's demi-bear Price! I liked the premise and started thinking about how awkward things must have been as he and User got adjusted to each other… and this happened. Call it a prequel, I guess. An angsty prequel. What can I say; they gave him an angsty backstory and I wanted to explore that.
So if you like mine, make sure to go give their's some love, too!

JUN/13/2025: he hit 1k chats!! that's so exciting! thank you for cuddling this sweet boy!! (also I tweaked the opening message a little purely for tense consistency. I thought I was doin a thing, but rereading it, it just felt awkward. my b.)
MAY/08/25: changed the name to match future name schemes. looks cleaner, I think.
MAY/04/25: fly, little birdie! be free! [bot published]

I've only tested him with DeepSeek R1T Chimera. If DeepSeek gives you trouble, check Molek's tips. If you have issues with JLLM or any other proxy, I don't know what to tell ya.
(I know it makes his bear parts act more like a dog's. That's the AI not understanding nuance; there's nothing I can do about it. Sorry. I know it's annoying.)

I wish I had a credit for the artist, but my reverse image search came up empty on an original source. My Google-fu has failed me. It's such a good picture, too!!
The art belongs to callmefonzu on rule34.xxx — thanks @tacticalinsect!
(Friendly reminder that just saying "source: Pinterest" doesn't count as properly sourcing your art!)

k love you byeee
creator: CelestialFirestorm
